title: Was the checkbox clearing value changed recently?
excerpt: I’ve noticed, when I was sending checked: “false” to a checkbox, it still checks the checkbox, but now it’s actually working as intended. Was this changed recently?

posts.author: eonox (Mervin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve noticed, when I was sending checked: “false” to a checkbox, it still checks the checkbox, but now it’s actually working as intended. Was this changed recently?
